titles.title: He's Ready to Come, I'm Ready to Go

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've seen all this world I want to see Things I'm hearing got no change in me I'm not worried about the future because I know He's ready to come and I'm ready to go

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It seems like everybody's talking about heaven If you wanna go along you better be believing I've got a feeling, someday soon we'll be leaving If you wanna have the strength you better not be slow He's ready to come are you ready to go?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes it seems that everything goes wrong I just sit around and cry, sing more sad songs Then He whispers in my ears and lets me know He's ready to come, and I'm ready to go.
